summary: Full backend + frontend testing of Prototask MVP. Backend APIs 100% functional (all 16 functional tests pass; 1 pre-assertion issue in my test with email case was E1's correct lowercase behavior). Frontend renders Dashboard, Tasks (list/kanban), Notes, Habits, Nutrition with AI input field. Login and navigation work. Minor testability issue: theme toggle & sign-out button missing data-testid attributes.

issues: No data-testid on 'Light mode' (theme-toggle) and 'Sign out' (logout-btn) buttons - required per problem statement which says 'use data-testid attributes throughout'

action_items: Add data-testid="theme-toggle" to the Light/Dark mode toggle button in AppShell
Add data-testid="logout-btn" to the Sign out button in AppShell
Recommended: add data-testid on nav items (nav-dashboard, nav-tasks, nav-notes, nav-habits, nav-nutrition), login-email, login-password, login-submit, view-list, view-kanban for future automation
critical_code_review_comments: server.py line 52-55: secure=True + samesite=none cookies only transmit over HTTPS - works for preview URL (https) but cookie-based auth will fail on plain http; bearer fallback mitigates. OK.
server.py line 493-503: overall_streak loop has no upper bound - could loop indefinitely if a habit was logged every day for years. Add safety cap (e.g., 3650 iterations).
server.py line 609: CORS allows only FRONTEND_URL + localhost; OK. allow_origins should not use '*' with credentials - correct.

server.py line 449-451: backticks strip logic buggy: text.strip('`') then strips 'json' prefix - if LLM returns ```json
{...}
``` strip removes backticks but leaves 'json
{...}' - the subsequent find('{')/rfind('}') still works, so no real bug. OK.
No rate limiting / brute force lockout on /api/auth/login (playbook asks for 5-fail lockout). Missing.
bcrypt hash format uses bcrypt.gensalt() - produces $2b$ prefix. OK.
test_credentials: user@example.com / user123 and admin@example.com / admin123 - both working
seed_data_creation: None (seeded users created by server startup hook work correctly)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest file at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py - 17 tests; one cosmetic test issue (email lowercase) to fix assertion. All CRUD, AI parse (Claude Sonnet 4.5), dashboard, insights, CSV exports verified working. Frontend login flow + page navigation + UI rendering confirmed via Playwright. Missing data-testid on theme toggle + logout; recommend main agent add these for robust UI automation. Brute-force lockout not implemented - mention in playbook review if applicable.
